About
Biomaterials are materials designed to support, replace, or fully take over the functions of tissues and organs in the human body. They do not necessarily have to be of biological origin; they can be made from metals, ceramics, natural or synthetic polymers, or composites of these materials.

Nöroradyoloji ve Manyetik Rezonans Görüntüleme (MRG) tıp bilimleri içinde hızla gelişen, ileri teknolojik aygıtlarla donatılmış bir üst bilim dalıdır. Üniversitemiz Beyin ve Sinir Cerrahisi, Nörolojik Bilimler, Radyoloji ve Patoloji Anabilim Dalları öğretim üyelerinin yıllar boyu süren çalışmaları, hasta ve ameliyat hizmetleri, bu konularda önemli bilgi birikimini sağlayarak sonuçta birçok uluslararası yayın ve kitap oluşturmuştur. Bu bilgi birikimi ile Nörolojik bilimler ve Nöroradyoloji alanında araştırmaları yoğunlaştırmak, bilgi üretiminin yaygınlaştırılmasını sağlamak amacıyla Eylül 2011 tarihinde Üniversitemiz bünyesinde Nöroradyoloji Uygulama ve Araştırma Merkezimiz kurulmuştur. Merkezin yakın gelecekte yapılacak başlıca çalışmaları aşağıda özetlenmiştir.
MRG de yeni sekansları ile klinik deneylerin ( Susceptibility Weighted İmaging ( SWI), Arteryel Spin Labeling (ASL) yürütülmesi
İntraoperatif MRG ile sekans optimizasyonları ve kontrast kullanımının araştırılması
MRG Spektroskopi ile hücre ve beyin tümörlerinin araştırılması
MRG Difüzyon Tensor Görüntüleme ve Fiber Tracing incelemeleri ile santral ve periferik sinir araştırmalarının yapılması
MRG-Fonksiyonel görüntüleme ile psikiyatrik hasta araştırmalarının yürütülmesi,
İleri MRG konularında çalışabilecek nitelikli araştırmacıların yetiştirilmesi ve bu konularda kurslar, ve seminerlerin sunulması
Acıbadem Sağlık Enstitüsünde yüksek lisans programına katkı sağlanması
Yurt çapında yüksek Tesla Magnetik Resonans Görüntüleme ile yapılmak istenen çalışmalara teknik ve uygulama düzeyinde destek verilmesi

Gün geçtikçe giderek artan önemli bir sağlık sorunu olan organ yetmezliği olan hastalarına, halen ülkemizin birçok sağlık merkezinde ivedilikle doğru tanı ve tedavi yaklaşımı getirilememektedir.
2007 yılında kurulan Acıbadem Üniversitesi sağlık bilimleri alanında ülkemizde mevcut bulunan açığı kapatmak üzere üstün bilgili, teknoloji kullanabilen, bilim üretebilen, yenilikçi elemanlar yetiştirmeyi hedeflemiştir. Üniversitemiz bünyesinde açılan tüm birimlerin nitelikli insan gücü yetiştiren araştırma odaklı merkezler olmasında, uzun yıllardan beri A kalite sağlık hizmetini en iyi ve güvenilir şekilde vermekte olan Acıbadem Sağlık Grubunun sağlam altyapısı önemli rol oynamaktadır.
Acıbadem Sağlık Grubu 11/10/2010 tarihinden itibaren, tüm dünyada olduğu gibi Türkiye'de de önemli bir sağlık sorunu olan organ yetmezliği hastalarına Organ Nakli Merkezi çatısı altında multidisipliner yaklaşımla ileri tanı ve tedavi hizmetleri vermektedir. Acıbadem Üniversitesi Organ Nakli Araştırma ve Uygulama Merkezi ise 02/11/2011 tarih 28103 sayılı Resmi Gazete’ de yayımlanarak faaliyete başlamıştır. Merkezin amacı; Acıbadem Üniversitesi'nin ilgili bölüm, anabilim dalları ve ünitelerinin işbirliği ile her türlü doku ve organ nakli uygulamasını çağdaş düzeyde gerçekleştirmek, doku ve organ nakli konularındaki yeni gelişmeleri ülkemize aktarmak, temel ve uygulamalı araştırmalar yapmak, bu alanda yeni teknikler geliştirmek, organ sağlamak ve toplumun her kesiminin organ nakli konusunda bilinçlenmesine yönelik çalışmalarda bulunmaktadır. ​

ACU Biobank
The ACU Biobank Unit is a research infrastructure that processes, organizes and stores biological samples and data. It was established to support scientific research by creating high-quality collections of biological samples and data related to diseases and sharing these collections with researchers, encouraging collaboration between researchers, thus providing infrastructure and increasing the opportunity for high-impact research. Our aim is to be a unit that conducts and supports world-class research and development activities in biobanking.

ACIBADEM UNIVERSITY ATAKENT HOSPITAL
Acıbadem University Atakent Hospital, which was put into service in 2014, has a closed area of 60,000 m2 and a bed capacity of 278. The hospital serves an average of 450,000 patients every year. Offering health services with a multidisciplinary approach, the hospital has units and centers in many different fields, as well as all the necessary training environments for the training of future health professionals.
ACIBADEM UNIVERSITY MASLAK HOSPITAL
Acıbadem University Maslak Hospital, which was put into service in 2009, has a closed area of 106.000 m2 and a bed capacity of 364. The hospital serves an average of 465,000 patients every year. The hospital, which offers health services with a multidisciplinary approach, has units and centers in many different fields, as well as all the necessary training environments for the training of future health professionals.

pages.title: PAPD Policy | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: Acıbadem University Periodic Academic Performance Evaluation (PAPD) is carried out in order to reveal the quality of academic activities of academic staff, to understand and support their open aspects, to strengthen their institutional belonging and to increase their motivation. PAPD also provides a fair, rational and reliable basis for the contract renewal processes of faculty members.

PAPD Scope
PAPD Process
University Introduction Booklet

Acıbadem University Periodic Academic Performance Evaluation (PAPD) is carried out in order to reveal the quality of academic activities of academic staff, to understand and support their open aspects, to strengthen their institutional belonging and to increase their motivation. PAPD also provides a fair, rational and reliable basis for the contract renewal processes of faculty members. During the evaluation process, the performances of the academicians in the previous period in the fields of research, education, service to the institution/community and achievements and recognition are reviewed. The process is structured and implemented in a way that is carried out with the principles of honesty, transparency and accountability.
PAPD process protects the personal rights of academicians; by evaluating their performance according to the conditions and possibilities of their work areas; aims to provide a rational, inclusive, equitable and peaceful working environment.

All academics in academic units (faculty members, lecturers, and research assistants) are within the scope of the process.
Participation in the 2024 PAPD process is associated with the contract renewal period of October 2024.
Participation in the 2024 PAPD process is a prerequisite for contract renewal.
Performance evaluation is carried out under the four categories listed below:
a. Research
b. Education
c. Service to the Institution/Society
d. Achievements and Recognition
For all categories, activities within the completed calendar year (01 January – 31 December 2023) are taken into consideration.

AVESIS - Academic Data Management System
It is open to internal and external access via the link
https://avesis.acibadem.edu.tr/
. AVESIS is an automation software that enables institutions to exhibit effective and strategic management, thanks to its functional modules for various purposes such as creating academic inventory, presenting personal web pages for researchers, producing instant or periodic activity reports and statistical information. It is a software that also includes the academic performance management model developed in order to take an inventory of academic activities, to measure and evaluate the performances of institutions, units, departments and individuals, and to create a sustainable quality assurance system. YÖKSİS is an Academic data management system that works integrated with WoS (Web of Science), Pubmed, Scopus.
DAPSIS – Externally Funded Project Management Processes System
It is open to internal and external access via the link
https://dapsis.acibadem.edu.tr/
. It is an automation system software developed for the creation and monitoring of the inventory of national and international project applications i.e. European Union, TUBITAK, Ministry of Development, Ministry of Industry, Ministry of Agriculture etc. and the execution of the processes of the projects supported in this context.
Electronic Document Management System Software (EBYS)
It is the system in which the correspondence with internal and external institutions is followed in electronic environment within the institution.
Data Access and Data Management
There are folders on the basis of faculties / units. The access of users to the data on the server is defined to the personnel of the relevant institution with the written approval of the data owner - manager.
OBS – Student Information System
It is open to internal and external access via the link
https://obs.acibadem.edu.tr/
OBS; is the Student Information System. It is the area where all the academic data of the students are processed and kept during the Education and Training at our University. When the information about the lecturers is forwarded to the Automation Officer by the Human Resources Department, a user login is created and the necessary information is sent to the academics via e-mail. Relevant guides are added to the published announcements so that the instructors and students can carry out the processes smoothly during periods such as course registrations and grade entries. For your questions about OBS, Student Affairs Automation Officer, Cem MEDE, can be reached at the extension number 4247 and e-mail address
Cem.Mede@acibem.edu.tr
.

The training management system is the training management software that allows the presentation of content, measurement and evaluation, monitoring and reporting of user information in asynchronous and synchronous education.
Thanks to this software, students' interest in education is monitored and their performance is monitored according to the scores they get from the tests. pages.title: Medical Center | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: Acıbadem University Health Center provides outpatient 1st level health care and psychological counseling services between 8.30-17.30 on weekdays. A full-time physician, a nurse, and a specialist psychologist working by appointment work in our center. In our center, health care is provided without an appointment. Within the scope of the COVID-19 Pandemic, the obligation of our personnel using prescription chronic drugs are no longer required to come to the infirmary for their prescription and they have started to be helped online by communication via e-mail or phone.

Acıbadem University Health Center provides outpatient 1st level health care and psychological counseling services between 8.30-17.30 on weekdays. A full-time physician, a nurse, and a specialist psychologist working by appointment work in our center. In our center, health care is provided without an appointment. Within the scope of the COVID-19 Pandemic, the obligation of our personnel using prescription chronic drugs are no longer required to come to the infirmary for their prescription and they have started to be helped online by communication via e-mail or phone. Our personnel who want to receive psychological services can make an appointment and request a session from our psychologist, except for emergencies.
While all our students and employees are provided with FREE service at our center, occupational medicine services are also provided within the scope of the "Occupational Health and Safety Regulation", so our employees can obtain their prescribed drugs from pharmacies covered by SSK, just by paying contribution margin as in Family Health Centers. Also, "periodic examinations" of our personnel are also carried out during the periods determined within the scope of the regulation. In addition, our employees and students are transferred to a higher institution after their first interventions are made when deemed necessary. Our employees and students also have discounts according to the scope of health services provided in hospitals and medical centers affiliated to Acıbadem Healthcare Group.
Within the scope of the COVID-19 Pandemic, COVID-19 transmission, isolation of contacts and suspects, filiation studies are also carried out, and our instructors within this scope are required to report their situation to the health centers.
Contact:

Kerem Aydınlar Campus has been designed with an appropriate architecture so that disabled individuals can work in the academic-administrative field, receive education as students and participate in research.
Fort his purpose;
A total of 18 handicapped WCs, 9 in the A block, 8 in the C block and 1 in the conference hall,

All of the building entrances in the parking lot have disabled ramps and easily accessible button-opening doors,

For students who enter the class with a wheelchair, it is possible to adapt the row spacing of the classrooms they use.

pages.title: Acıbadem University Incubation Center | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: It is a center that supports the maturation of new business ideas in the field of health, their transformation into products and their implementation. Application calls are made twice a year and it accepts both internal and external project applications. Each project that passes the evaluation process is included in 3-month programs. Entrepreneurs who successfully complete this program are brought together with potential investors.
pages.text:

Acıbadem University Biodesign Center
Externally Funded Project System (DAPSIS)

Intellectual property
Patents
Copyright

It is a center that supports the maturation of new business ideas in the field of health, their transformation into products and their implementation. Application calls are made twice a year and it accepts both internal and external project applications. Each project that passes the evaluation process is included in 3-month programs. Entrepreneurs who successfully complete this program are brought together with potential investors.
There are 5 different programs carried out in the Incubation Center. These are; pre-incubation, incubation, accelerator, global accelerator and bigghealth program. The supports provided to entrepreneurs during these programs are as follows;
-Office Facilities: Open office areas are offered to entrepreneurs, entrepreneurs can make use of the meeting rooms of the center by making a request. In addition, unlimited tea and coffee service is offered throughout the day in the center.
-Academic Consultancy: According to the field the entrepreneur needs in the project, consultancy support is provided by Acıbadem University academics.
-Sectoral Consultancy: Entrepreneurs are provided with consultancy and mentoring support from Acıbadem Healthcare Group and Acıbadem Incubation Center affiliates, depending on the area of the project.
Access to Potential Investors, Customers and Business Partners: According to the field of the project (Health related and medical devices, Biomedical materials, Pharmaceutical formulations and probiotics, Digital / mobile health applications, Wearable technologies / diagnostic and analysis kits, Food safety) support is provided to the entrepreneur.
Access to Technological Infrastructure: After the entrepreneur is accepted to the center, the deficiencies in the project and the opportunities that Acıbadem University Incubation Center can provide are determined through one-to-one interviews. According to the identified deficiencies, the entrepreneur can benefit from the determined units accompanied by a consultant.
Access to the Prototyping Workshop: In the Prototyping Workshop, entrepreneurs can get the necessary support from our 2 design experts to design and build their prototypes. Entrepreneurs with sufficient knowledge can carry out their own work at specified time intervals. The devices available in the laboratory are as follows;
3D printer
3D scanner
Drill press
Cleaning Station
Laser Cutter
Electronic and chemical consumables
Training and Seminars: In the periods when the programs are started, trainings and seminars are organized for the fields that entrepreneurs may need for all their processes. The previous trainings are as follows; - Business Model Training - Project Writing Training - Finance Training - Legal Training - Intellectual Property Rights Training - Health Regulations Training - Effective Presentation Techniques Training
Bigghealth Program
As of July 2018, our center has been selected by TÜBİTAK as "1512 Techno-enterprise Capital Support Program Implementing Organization". In this context, it accepts projects by opening a call for the 1512 program twice a year in accordance with the TUBITAK calendar. Entrepreneurs who qualify for Stage 2 in the Bigghealth program are forwarded to TUBITAK. Entrepreneurs who are also successful in TÜBİTAK's panels are entitled to receive 200,000 TL venture capital support.
Click to visit the center's website.

pages.title: Acıbadem University Biodesign Center | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: It is a center that works to transform the ideas of academics, health professionals and 3rd parties into innovation. It was established to support the successful results of clinical innovations by directing projects in the healthcare industry within the framework of a value-oriented innovation ecosystem.

It is a center that works to transform the ideas of academics, health professionals and 3rd parties into innovation. It was established to support the successful results of clinical innovations by directing projects in the healthcare industry within the framework of a value-oriented innovation ecosystem.
It provides support for you in your projects, providing you with appropriate funding, establishing connections with different experts you may need regarding your project, determining the regulations to which your project is subject, conducting user and market analysis, obtaining intellectual and property rights and cooperating with 3rd party companies in commercialization steps. In this context, project process design, product design, product-user relationship, interaction of human factors with design, model and prototype production, technical support for production, material information support studies are carried out.
FDM and SLA 3D printers in Biodesign Center Workshop, UV Curing Machine, Laser Cutting Machine, Benchtop Column Drill, Hand Motor, Jigsaw, Heat Gun, Hand Drill, Basic Workshop Tools, Vacuum Soldering Iron Station, Basic Circuit Elements, Electronic Bench, Illuminated Product Shooting Tent equipment contributes to the development of your projects. Click here to visit the center's website.

Ethics Committees
There are three ethical committees operating in our university.
CLINICAL RESEARCH ETHICS COMMITTEE: Project applications within the scope of clinical research regulations are evaluated.
MEDICAL RESEARCH ETHICS COMMITTEE (ATADEK) Project applications outside the scope of clinical research regulations are evaluated.
LOCAL ETHICS COMMITTEE FOR ANIMAL EXPERIMENTS (ACU-HADYEK) Project applications that are planned to be made with experimental animals are evaluated in ACU-DEHAM.
Acıbadem University Scientific Research Projects Commission (ABAPKO)
Acıbadem University Scientific Research Projects Commission evaluates the scientific research and infrastructure development project proposals that will be carried out in accordance with the vision, mission and founding values of the University in line with its directives and approves the appropriateness of allocating funds from the relevant academic year budget. (Annex 6)
Research Laboratories Coordination Board (ALKOK)
Established in 2019, ALKOK coordinates the procurement processes of all research laboratories within the university, follow-up of maintenance-service agreements and the joint use of laboratories.
CLINICAL TRIALS SUPPORT AND FOLLOW-UP COMMITTEE (KlinikAr)
KlinikAr has been operating since October 2019.
Ethics committee approvals were obtained and it was established to facilitate the conduct of Phase II, Phase III and Phase IV clinical trials. In order to facilitate the functioning of clinical studies, the Board provides compliance with current GCP (Good Clinical Practice) standards and the technical and operational support needed at every step of the process, with a team of experienced professionals within the institution. The Clinical Research Support and Follow-up Board was established to increase the number of clinical trials within the body of Acıbadem Healthcare Group (ASG), and to monitor the processes legally and financially in terms of researchers and hospital management.
The aim of KlinikAr is; to provide an environment in which clinicians should be less concerned with aspects of the trial beyond the application of the scientific protocol. It ensures that clinical trials to be carried out in ASG hospitals are initiated and conducted in accordance with certain rules, communication and registration mechanisms.
ClinicAr members consist of; Medical Directorate Representatives, Dean of the School of Medicine representative, Planning and Business Development Department representative (pricing and contract management), Progress Payment and System Development Department representative, and Legal Department representative.
Duties and authorities are defined. Board; evaluates the clinical research project that has been drafted operationally and financially, and ensures the increase and effective sharing of the income to be obtained from this activity. Creates a business plan by connecting with interested parties. It guides the preparations to be made before and after the approval of the Clinical Research Ethics Committee for clinical research. After the approval of the Clinical Research Ethics Committee, the contract to be made between the participants plays a guiding and facilitating role in the protocol correspondence. During the study, it communicates with the relevant departments for the necessary logistics and human resources support and creates a decision, ensures its implementation, and follows up. Searches, finds and puts into practice the ways of solution partnership within the ASG in the new operational requirements that may arise during the clinical research period. It follows the operational processes as long as the research continues. Clinical research applications are finalized by working with the delegated committee members in order of priority.
The committee convenes with the call of the work group chairman, when necessary, depending on the frequency of applications received, and meets 4 times a year for regular review.
You can reach the Clinical Research Support and Follow-up Board from the e-mail address
KlinikAr@acibadem.com
.

Within the scope of Industrial Property Law No. 6769 published in 2017, brands, geographical indications, designs, patents and utility models are protected under this law. The Research Projects Office provides support for your trademark, design, geographical indication, patent/utility model applications to be made within the scope of the relevant law at our university. The method followed in applications with the title of patent/utility model is detailed below:
Patent or utility model protection is the monopoly rights granted to the patent/utility model owner for a limited time and place to prevent the unauthorized production, sale, use or import of the invention by third parties.
In order for an invention to be patentable, it must include the criteria of novelty, inventive step and industrial applicability. Before applying, it is highly recommended to do a preliminary research on the technical field that is the subject of the invention. The following links can be used for patent preliminary research:
https://portal.turkpatent.gov.tr/anonim/arastirma/patent/detayli
https://tr.espacenet.com/
ya da
https://worldwide.espacenet.com/
http
s
://patentscope
.wipo.int
/search/en/search.jsf
https://www.uspto.gov/patents/search
https://www.google.com/?tbm=pts
After the preliminary research, you can contact the Research Projects Office at
projeofisi@acibadem.edu.tr
and get information about the continuation of the process. An invention notification form is first sent to the researchers by the project office and it is requested to be filled. This request is submitted to the Rectorate by the project office and all expenses of the inventions accepted under the Industrial Property Law are covered by the University with the approval of the Rectorate.

pages.title: Patents | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: All patents applied under the rights of our university are followed by the Research Projects Office. During the patent application phase, joint studies are carried out with the patent offices from which service is purchased, and the specification is prepared and the countries where the patent will be protected are determined. Share distribution is made according to the intellectual property rights ratios determined by the Rectorate at the patent application stage.

pages.description: Acıbadem University collaborates with the Proofstack platform so that researchers can protect the copyrights of their inventions, designs, content, drawings, compositions, scripts, articles and all their other works worldwide. Proofstack application, enables the creation of place and time stamps in the preferred blockchain protocols via web or mobile applications for all data created before the patent application or during the research process.

pages.description: Intra-Institutional Lateral Transfer Intra-institutional Lateral Transfer refers to the transfer of a student enrolled in departments/programs of Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University to other diploma programs at the same level (undergraduate to undergraduate, from associate degree to associate degree) within the university.
pages.text:
Home
Home
Intra-Institutional Lateral Transfer
Lateral Transfer
Intra-Institutional Lateral Transfer
Inter-Institutional Lateral Transfer
Central Lateral Transfer
University Introduction Booklet
Virtual Tour
Intra-Institutional Lateral Transfer
Intra-institutional Lateral Transfer refers to the transfer of a student enrolled in departments/programs of Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University to other diploma programs at the same level (undergraduate to undergraduate, from associate degree to associate degree) within the university.
Student admission through intra-institutional lateral transfer is made in accordance with the provisions of Higher Education Council's "Regulation on the Principles of Transfer between Associate and Undergraduate Degree Programs in Higher Education Institutions, Double Major, Minor and Inter-Institutional Credit Transfer" and "Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University Undergraduate, Associate Degree Programs Lateral Programs Transfer Directive".
Related Directives and Regulations
Click here for Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University Directive for Lateral Transfer in Undergraduate, Associate Degree Diploma Programs.
Click here for the Regulation on the Principles of Transfer between Associate and Undergraduate Degree Programs in Higher Education Institutions, Double Major, Minor and Inter-Institutional Credit Transfer.
Click here for the base scores of Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University departments/programs.
Click here for ÖSYS / YKS Base and Top Scores.
Click here for lateral transfer quotas.
Documents Required for Application
Student certificate
Transcript
ÖSYS / DGS / YKS Placement Result Document
YGS Result Document / YKS Result Document
Certificate of Achievement (For lateral transfers from the secondary education programs to a primary education program, a document stating that the student is in the top 10% of the class in terms of success)
Health Report
a)
Students of Vocational School of Health Services, First and Emergency Aid, First and Emergency Aid (SE), registered in 2018 and earlier, should obtain a medical board report from either an institution offered by the university for registration or a fully-fledged public hospital, certifying that they do not have any physical or mental disability that would prevent them from pursuing this profession during and after their education,
b)
Vocational School Health Services First and Emergency Aid Program, First and Emergency Aid Program (SE) students must obtain another report from the Medical Faculties of Universities or state hospitals capable to issue the necessary report, together with the Health Report in item (a) above. This report should be stating that they have a physical structure and mental health that does not prevent them from obtaining a driver's license, also they should not be shorter than 1.65 m in male students and 1.60 m in female students, and that they should weigh no more than 5 kilograms less or 15 kilograms more than the last two digits of height value expressed in centimeters. As per the program students must have completed the age of 17 on the date of enrollment as it is compulsory for them to drive in 2nd class. While working in a team of two people in rescue and transportation works, they must have the physical and physical competence to carry a patient on a stretcher with their teammate.
The applications will be made through the Student Information System of the Student Affairs with the completely prepared application documents.
Student Affairs Contact Information:
ogrenci.isleri@acibadem.edu.tr
Tel:
+90 216 500 44 44 (Ext: 4240-4241-4244-4245-4246)

Meslek Yüksekokulları ile açıköğretim ön lisans programı mezunlarının lisans öğrenimine geçişi için Ölçme, Seçme ve Yerleştirme Merkezi Başkanlığı tarafından yapılan sınavdır.
DGS KAYIT TAKVİMİ
1.
E-Kayıt (e-Devlet üzerinden online kayıt)

11-15 Eylül 2025

https://www.turkiye.gov.tr/

KULLANIM KILAVUZU
’na aşağıdaki linkten ulaşabilirsiniz.
https://static.turkiye.gov.tr/themes/ankara/assets/manuals/YOK-Kayit.pdf
*E-Devlet üzerinden kaydını tamamlayan öğrencilerin üniversiteye gelerek evrak teslim etmelerine gerek bulunmamaktadır.
2.
Yüz Yüze Kayıt (Bizzat Üniversitemiz kampüsüne gelerek kayıt)
Kayıt Tarihleri:
11-17 Eylül 2025
Kayıt Saatleri:
09:00-17:00 (Hafta içi her gün)
Kayıtların Yapılacağı Yer:
Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar Üniversitesi Kerem Aydınlar Kampüsü Kayışdağı Cad. No:32 Ataşehir /İstanbul
*Her iki şekilde de kayıt işlemini gerçekleştirmek için önce
https://obs.acibadem.edu.tr/oibs/ogrsis/ogr_on_kayit_op.aspx
adresinden ön kaydınızı tamamlamanız gerekmektedir. Ön kayıt yapmış olmanız kesin kayıt olduğunuz anlamına gelmemektedir.
KAYIT İÇİN GEREKLİ EVRAKLAR
Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar Üniversitesi lisans bölümlerine kayıt yaptırmaya hak kazanan öğrencilerin Üniversite kayıt işlemleri için aşağıdaki belgeleri hazırlamaları gerekmektedir.
E-Kayıt yöntemiyle kayıt yaptıran öğrenciler aşağıda belirtilen belgeleri kayıt tarihleri arasında birimimize teslim etmelilerdir.
Diploma
Adayın ön lisans diplomasının aslı veya geçici mezuniyet belgesinin aslı (Başarı Belgesi mezuniyet belgesi yerine kullanılmaz.)
Lise Diploması Aslı
2 Adet Transkript (Onaylı mühürlü veya e-imzalı )
2 Adet Derslerin ayrıntılı içerikleri (Onaylı mühürlü veya e-imzalı)
Sınav Sonuç Belgesi
DGS internet sitesinden çıktısını alabileceğiniz sınav ve yerleştirme sonuç belgenizi yanınızda getiriniz.
Kimlik Bilgileri
Nüfus cüzdanı aslı ve kayıt esnasında Öğrenci İşleri Müdürlüğü’ne verilmek üzere 1 adet fotokopisi (Kimlik fotokopisi ön ve arka yüzü A4 kağıdında aynı sayfada görülecek şekilde olmalıdır. Mali İşler Müdürlüğü ile kullanılacak ise Yurt Müdürlüğü’ne verilmek üzere ayrıca 2 adet fotokopi daha bulundurulmalıdır. Lütfen evrak fotokopilerinizi yanınızda bulundurunuz.)
Askerlik İşlemleri
Erkek adaylar için Askerlik Durum Belgesi (e-Devletten online alınmaktadır.)
Fotoğraf
Son altı ay içinde çekilmiş 3 adet fotoğraf (Fotoğrafların arkasına ad soyadı yazılmalıdır.) (Renkli fotokopi geçerli değildir.)
Dekont
Öğrenim ücretinin ödendiğine ait banka dekontu (tam burslu öğrenciler hariç).
ÖNEMLİ BİLGİLER
Belirtilen tarihler arasında kesin kaydını yaptırmayan aday, herhangi bir hak iddia edemez.
DERS SAYDIRMA VE AKADEMİK İŞLEMLER
Ders Saydırma işlemleri için öğrencilerin kayıt işlemleri tamamlandıktan sonra kayıt oldukları Fakülte Dekanlığına başvurmaları gerekmektedir. Başvuru için,
Dilekçe
Mezun Olduğu Ön Lisans Programına Ait Onaylı Mühürlü veya e -imzalı Transkript
Mezun Olduğu Ön Lisans Programına Ait Onaylı Mühürlü Ders İçerikleri
DGS ile Üniversitemize kayıt olan öğrencilerin eğitim dili Türkçe olan bölümler için kayıtları 3. sınıfa yapılmaktadır. Eğitim dili İngilizce olan bölümleri için öğrencilerin İngilizce Hazırlık Muafiyet ve Düzey Belirleme Sınavına (ACEPT) girmeleri gerekmektedir, sınavdan başarılı olmaları halinde öğrencilerin kayıtları 3. sınıfa yapılacaktır, sınav tarihleri ile ilgili Yabancı Diller Bölümü Hazırlık Koordinatörü tarafından sizlere bilgi verilecektir.
Öğrencilerin kaç dönemde mezun olacağı, daha önce almış olduğu derslerin hangilerinin sayılıp, sayılmayacağı ilgili akademik kurullar tarafından transkript ve ders içerikleri incelendikten ve alması gereken dersler karara bağlandıktan sonra belirlenecektir.

tıklayınız.

DOUBLE MAJOR PROGRAM
The Double Major Program allows the student enrolled in an undergraduate program at Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University to take courses from a second undergraduate program simultaneously and receive two separate diplomas, provided that they meet the success requirements and other conditions.
Click here
for Double Major Program List
Application Dates
Application dates for the Double Major Program are included in the academic calendar and the Registrar's Office informs about the dates and quotas in the announcement area in the relevant period.
Application Terms
Students applying for double major education;
1) who are enrolled to a major undergraduate diploma program, can apply at the beginning of third semester earliest. Latest application dates are beginning of fifth semester in four-year programs, seventh semester in five-year programs, ninth semester in the six-year programs. Students who are enrolled to a major associate degree program can apply at the beginning of second semester earliest and at the beginning of the third semester latest. Students can apply to the Registrar's Office within the periods stipulated in the academic calendar.
2) The total number of students to be admitted to the DMP is determined by the Senate, provided that it is not less than 20% of the quota of the relevant program.
3) The student applying for double major education;
a.
should have successfully completed all the courses in the major program until the semester they applied for,
b.
must score a cumulative grade point average of at least 2.80 and being in the top 20% in terms of the success ranking made according to the grade point average of the students in their own semester in the main major program,
c.
Students who have a GPA of at least 2.80 but cannot make it to the top 20% in the major program according to the success ranking made according to the GPA of the students in their own semester can apply if the double major program has a score not less than the base score of the relevant year. These students are evaluated in case there is a quota after the applications of the students who are in the top 20% are listed.
d.
Students enrolled in a Turkish-medium diploma program must meet the English proficiency requirement applicable to new student admission to the relevant program in order to apply for the English-medium double major program.
e.
Foreign students whose native language is not Turkish must meet the Turkish proficiency requirement, which is valid for admission of new students to these undergraduate diploma programs, in order to be able to apply to the double major programs opened within the scope of the diploma programs in which the language of instruction is Turkish.
f.
For the second major programs that admit students with an aptitude test, they must also be successful in the aptitude test.
g.
The student who wants to do a double major in the programs for which the success ranking condition is required must have met the success ranking condition determined by the Higher Education Council of the relevant program in the year (s)he is registered.
4) The admission of students who meet the conditions is decided by the administrative board of the unit to which the second major program is affiliated.
Related Directives and Regulations
Application terms;
Click here
for Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University Directive for Double Major and Minor Programs
Click here
for Regulation on the Principles of Transfer between Associate Degree and Undergraduate Degree Programs in Higher Education Institutions, Double Major, Minor and Inter-Institutional Credit Transfer
Click here
for Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University English Preparatory Program and English Lessons Education-Teaching and Examination Directive
MINOR PROGRAM
The Minor Program enables the student enrolled in an undergraduate program at Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University to receive a minor certificate, which does not replace a diploma, by taking a limited number of courses in order to gain knowledge on a specific subject within the scope of a second undergraduate program within the same university, provided that the success conditions and other conditions are met.
Click here
for Minor Program List
Application Dates
University minor application dates are included in the academic calendar, and the Registrar's Office informs about the dates and quotas in the announcement area in the relevant period.
Application Terms
In order for the student to apply for the Minor Program;
1) A student can apply to the minor program earliest at the beginning of the third semester and at the beginning of the sixth semester latest.
2) the cumulative grade point average at the time of application must be at least 2.50 and (s)he must have completed all the courses related to the major program with at least a passing grade until the semester (s)he applies.
3) Students who enroll in the undergraduate diploma program of ACU through horizontal transfer or vertical transfer between institutions are required to study at least one semester in the program they are enrolled in, in order to apply for the minor programs.
4) Students enrolled in a Turkish-medium undergraduate diploma program must meet the English proficiency requirement applicable to new student admission to the relevant program in order to apply for the English-medium minor program.
5) Foreign students whose native language is not Turkish must meet the Turkish proficiency requirement, which is valid for admission of new students to these undergraduate diploma programs, in order to be able to apply to minor programs opened within the scope of Turkish-medium diploma programs.
6) In order for the student to be accepted to the minor programs opened within the scope of the undergraduate diploma programs that admit students with the aptitude test, it is imperative that the student also be successful in the aptitude test.
7) The student must meet the application and admission requirements in addition to the ones stated in this directive with the proposal of the faculty administrative board and the senate decision.
8) Applications for minor programs are made to the Registrar's Office, within the periods stipulated in the academic calendar. The applications of the students who meet the conditions are evaluated and decided by the faculty administrative board where the minor program is carried out. Students who are accepted to minor programs apply to the Registrar's Office between the announced dates and register for the minor program they were accepted to.
9) Students can study at the same time in a second major diploma program and a minor program or in more than one minor program.
10) A student who leaves a minor program cannot enroll in the same minor program again.
Related Directives and Regulations

for Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University Directive for Double Major and Minor Programs
Click here

Çift Anadal Programı
Yandal Programı
Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar Üniversitesi’nde bir lisans programına kayıtlı olan öğrencinin lisans programını ile, ön lisans programına kayıtlı olan öğrencinin ise ön lisans programı ile başarı şartı ve diğer koşulları sağlaması halinde çift anadal başvurusunda bulunabilir.
ÇİFT ANADAL LİSANS PROGRAM LİSTESİ için
tıklayınız.
ÇİFT ANADAL ÖN LİSANS PROGRAM LİSTESİ için
tıklayınız.
Başvuru Tarihleri
Çift Anadal Programı başvuru tarihleri akademik takvimde yer almakta olup, ilgili dönemde Öğrenci İşleri Müdürlüğü tarafından duyuru alanından tarihler ve kontenjanlar hakkında gerekli bilgilendirmeler yapılmaktadır.
Başvuru Koşulları
Çift Anadal öğrenimine başvuran öğrencinin;
1) Öğrenciler, çift anadal öğrenimi için, anadal lisans diploma programında en erken üçüncü yarıyılın başında en geç ise dört yıllık programlarda beşinci yarıyılın başında, beş yıllık programlarda yedinci yarıyılın başında, altı yıllık programlarda ise dokuzuncu yarıyılın başında, anadal ön lisans diploma programında en erken ikinci yarıyılın başında, en geç ise üçüncü yarıyılın başında olmak üzere akademik takvimde öngörülen süreler içinde Öğrenci İşleri Müdürlüğü’ne başvurabilirler.
2) ÇAP’a kabul edilecek toplam öğrenci sayısı, ilgili programın kontenjanının %20’sinden az olmamak üzere senato tarafından belirlenir.
3) Çift anadal öğrenimine başvuran öğrencinin
a. başvurduğu yarıyıla kadar aldığı anadal programındaki tüm dersleri başarıyla tamamlamış olması,
b. genel not ortalamasının en az 2.80 olması ve esas anadal programında kendi yarıyılındaki öğrencilerin genel not ortalamasına göre yapılan başarı sıralaması itibarıyla ilk %20’ye girmiş olması,
c. genel not ortalamasının en az 2.80 olan ancak anadal programında kendi yarıyılındaki öğrencilerin genel not ortalamasına göre yapılan başarı sıralaması itibarıyla ilk %20’ye giremeyen öğrenciler çift anadal yapacağı programın ilgili yıldaki taban puanından az olmamak üzere puana sahip olması halinde başvuru yapabilir. Bu öğrenciler ilk %20’ye giren öğrencilerin başvurularının sıralanması sonrası kontenjan olması halinde değerlendirmeye alınır.
d. Öğrenim dili Türkçe olan diploma programına kayıtlı olan öğrencilerin öğrenim dili İngilizce olan çift anadal programına başvurabilmeleri için ilgili programa yeni öğrenci kabulünde geçerli olan İngilizce yeterlik koşulunu sağlamaları şarttır.
e. Anadili Türkçe olmayan yabancı uyruklu öğrencilerin, öğrenim dili Türkçe olan diploma programları kapsamında açılan çift anadal programlarına başvurabilmeleri için, bu lisans diploma programlarına yeni öğrenci kabulünde geçerli olan Türkçe yeterlik koşulunu sağlamaları şarttır.
f. Yetenek sınavı ile öğrenci alan ikinci anadal programları için yetenek sınavından da başarılı olması gerekir.
g. Başarı sıralaması şartı aranan programlarda çift anadal yapmak isteyen öğrencinin, kayıtlı olduğu yıldaki ilgili programın Yüksek Öğretim Kurulu tarafından belirlenen başarı sıralaması şartını sağlamış olması gerekir.
4) Koşulları sağlayan öğrencilerin kabulü, ikinci anadal programının bağlı olduğu birimin yönetim kurulunca kararı bağlanır.
Konuyla ilgili Yönerge ve Yönetmelikler
Başvuru koşulları;
Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar Üniversitesi Çift Anadal ve Yandal Yönergesi için
tıklayınız.
Yükseköğretim Kurumlarında Ön Lisans ve Lisans Düzeyindeki Programlar Arasında Geçiş, Çift Anadal, Yan Dal ile Kurumlararası Kredi Transferi Yapılması Esaslarına İlişkin Yönetmelik için
tıklayınız.
Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar Üniversitesi İngilizce Hazırlık Programı İle İngilizce Dersleri Eğitim-Öğretim ve Sınav Yönergesi için
tıklayınız.
Yandal Programı, Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar Üniversitesi’nde bir lisans programına kayıtlı olan öğrencinin, başarı şartlarını ve diğer koşulları sağlamak koşuluyla, aynı üniversite içinde ikinci bir lisans programı kapsamında belirli bir konuda bilgilenmek amacıyla sınırlı sayıda ders almak suretiyle diploma yerine geçmeyen yandal sertifikası almasını sağlar.
YANDAL PROGRAM LİSTESİ
için tıklayınız.
Başvuru Tarihleri
Üniversite yandal başvuru tarihleri akademik takvimde yer almakta olup, ilgili dönemde Öğrenci İşleri Müdürlüğü tarafından duyuru alanından tarihler ve kontenjanlar hakkında gerekli bilgilendirmeler yapılmaktadır. Başvuru Koşulları Öğrenci, Yandal Programı’na, anadal programının en erken üçüncü, en geç altıncı yarıyılının başında başvurabilir.
Öğrencinin Yandal Programı’na başvurabilmesi için;
1) Öğrenci, yandal programına, anadal programının en erken üçüncü, en geç altıncı yarıyılın başında başvurabilir.
2) Öğrencinin yandal programına başvurabilmesi için, başvuru sırasındaki genel not ortalamasının en az 2.50 olması ve başvurduğu yarıyıla kadar anadal programına ilişkin aldığı tüm dersleri en az geçer not ile tamamlamış olması gerekir.
3) Kurumlar arası yatay geçiş veya dikey geçiş ile ACU’nun lisans diploma programına kayıt yaptıran öğrencilerin yandal programlarına başvurabilmesi için, kayıt yaptırdıkları programda en az bir yarıyıl öğrenim görmeleri zorunludur.
4) Öğrenim dili Türkçe olan lisans diploma programına kayıtlı olan öğrencilerin öğrenim dili İngilizce olan yandal programına başvurabilmeleri için ilgili programa yeni öğrenci kabulünde geçerli olan İngilizce yeterlik koşulunu sağlamaları şarttır.
5) Anadili Türkçe olmayan yabancı uyruklu öğrencilerin, öğrenim dili Türkçe olan diploma programları kapsamında açılan yandal programlarına başvurabilmeleri için, bu lisans diploma programlarına yeni öğrenci kabulünde geçerli olan Türkçe yeterlik koşulunu sağlamaları şarttır.
6) Öğrencinin yetenek sınavı ile öğrenci alan lisans diploma programları kapsamında açılan yandal programlarına kabul edilebilmesi için yetenek sınavından da başarılı olması şarttır.
7) Öğrencinin, başvurduğu yandal programını yürüten fakülte yönetim kurulunun teklifi ve senato kararı ile bu yönergede belirtilenlere ek olarak getirilen başvuru ve kabul koşullarını sağlaması gerekir.
8) Yandal programlarına başvurular, akademik takvimde öngörülen süreler içinde, Öğrenci İşleri Müdürlüğü’ne yapılır. Koşulları sağlayan öğrencilerin başvuruları, yandal programının yürütüldüğü fakülte yönetim kurulu tarafından değerlendirilerek karara bağlanır. Yandal programlarına kabul edilen öğrenciler, ilan edilen tarihler arasında Öğrenci İşleri Müdürlüğü’ne başvurarak kabul edildikleri yandal programına kayıtlarını yaptırırlar.
9) Öğrenciler, aynı anda ikinci anadal diploma programı ile yandal programında veya birden fazla yandal programında öğrenim görebilirler.
10) Bir yandal programından ayrılan öğrenci yeniden aynı yandal programına kayıt yaptıramaz.
Konuyla ilgili Yönerge ve Yönetmelikler
Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar Üniversitesi Çift Anadal ve Yandal Yönergesi
için tıklayınız.
Yükseköğretim Kurumlarında Ön Lisans ve Lisans Düzeyindeki Programlar Arasında Geçiş, Çift Anadal, Yan Dal ile Kurumlararası Kredi Transferi Yapılması Esaslarına İlişkin Yönetmelik
için

için

Graduate Information System
Graduation and Diploma Procedures
Dear Alumni,
Maintaining interaction with our graduates is of great importance for our University. For this purpose, in order to reach up-to-date data about you and to receive feedback from you. "Graduate Information System" has been made available.
In order to maintain your communication with our university, you must enter/update your information in the system by logging into the Alumni Information System.
By clicking on the fields below, you can access the information guide on the use of the system and log in to the system.
We would like to thank you in advance for your support for this process, which will take a few minutes of your time. Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University Rectorate
Click to enter the Alumni Information System
Click here for the Alumni Information System user guide
Graduation
Students are eligible to receive their diploma as long as they have completed the graduation requirements for the program in which they are enrolled.
Procedures regarding graduation, diplomas and related documents are carried out according to the Acıbadem University Diploma, Diploma Book, Certificate of Graduation and Other Documents Regulation.
Finalization of Graduation
Students are evaluated within the framework of the graduation requirements for the program on which they are enrolled. Students who have completed their academic obligations are identified on the final day for grade entries in the academic calendar. The graduation of students who have been identified is finalized by the decision made by the institute/faculty/college to which they are affiliated. Student Affairs begins the graduation procedures for students whose graduation has been finalized.
Procedure for Graduation
Students whose graduation has been finalized by the board are issued with a “Temporary Graduation Document”. Students who receive the "Temporary Graduation Document” must then fulfill the following procedures.
1- Disassociation from the University
Students are required to return any material which has been allocated to them by one of the University departments listed below.
Unit / Department / Officer
Procedure
Library
Paying library debt etc.
Financial Affairs
Financial records (Debt information)
Student Affairs
Hand in student ID card
2- Diploma Procedures
The diplomas are prepared and sent to the Ministry of Health for approval. Once this is completed, the University internet website publishes the date that the student diplomas are ready for collection.
3- Diploma Collection
Students must bring their Temporary Graduation Document to Student Affairs where they sign the Diploma Book to receive their diplomas. Diplomas and related documents are only given in person and signed for by the graduates themselves or by those who have been given power of attorney.
Important Information:
Diplomas are only given in person and signed for by the graduates themselves or by those who have been given power of attorney. Diplomas are not handed over in any other way.
Temporary Graduation Documents are issued only once.
It is advised that the original document is not handed over to, e.g., apply for work, but instead, if required, a notarized photocopy or copy should be used.
Once all procedures associated with graduation are complete, all documents which were handed into the university upon enrollment e.g. high school diploma can be collected from Student Affairs.

pages.text:
Where Future
Minds Meet
Acıbadem University is an institution operating in the field of health sciences and was founded in 2007 by the Acıbadem Health and Education Foundation. The university offers dynamic and contemporary educational programs across 5 faculties, 4 institutes, and 2 vocational schools.

USEFUL INFORMATION
Undergraduate Programs

How To Apply?
Scholarship
Dormitory
Contact Us
Life in İstanbul
Living and Learning in Istanbul with Acıbadem University
Istanbul, one of the world’s most captivating cities, uniquely blends history, culture, and modern life. Once the capital of three great empires, it offers a rich heritage where the past and future meet. Its multicultural atmosphere, art scene, and festivals make it a vibrant cultural hub, while its geography-spanning Europe and Asia-adds to its unmatched charm.
As a center of science and education, Istanbul hosts many universities and research institutions, fostering innovation and academic growth.
At the heart of this dynamic city, Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University combines Istanbul’s energy with academic excellence. With its modern campus, expert faculty, advanced simulation centers, and strong ties to Acıbadem Healthcare Group, the university provides an education that supports both professional and personal development—making life and study in Istanbul an exceptional experience.
Read More
Education in Turkiye
Studying in Türkiye with Acıbadem University
Türkiye stands out with its deep-rooted history, rich cultural heritage, rapidly developing scientific infrastructure, and strategic position between East and West-offering students unique opportunities for both academic and personal growth.
Across the country, every city blends history, art, and nature, creating a truly multicultural learning experience. Ancient sites, architectural beauty, and natural diversity make education go beyond the classroom.
Türkiye’s universities have become increasingly research-oriented and globally connected through international collaborations and exchange programs, preparing students for success on a global scale.
Among them, Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University in Istanbul specializes in health sciences and combines academic excellence with innovation. With its strong faculty, advanced simulation laboratories, modern campus, and clinical training through the Acıbadem Healthcare Group, it offers students more than a degree-it offers a vision. For those seeking to combine Türkiye’s cultural and scientific richness with high-quality modern education, Acıbadem University is the ideal choice.
Read More
For More Information
WHY
ACIBADEM UNIVERSITY?
A Thematic University on Healthcare
Acıbadem University is fully dedicated to the field of health sciences, offering specialized programs that address the evolving needs of the healthcare sector. Its focused approach ensures that every aspect of education is aligned with real-world medical practice and innovation.
Research-Focused University
Research is a cornerstone of the university’s mission, fostering an environment where innovation and scientific discovery thrive. Students and faculty collaborate on projects that contribute to advancements in medicine and healthcare technologies.
Advanced Laboratories in Health Sciences
Cutting edge laboratories allow students to develop their skills in realistic yet risk-free environment. This hands-on approach bridges the gap between classroom learning and real-life.
Success and Support Scholarships
The university offers a range of scholarships to reward academic excellence and provide financial support to students in need. These initiatives encourage achievement and help ensure equal access to quality education.
Center of Advanced Simulation and Education (CASE)
CASE is one of the world’s top three medical simulation centers, applying a unique educational model with simulated patients, e-learning, and skill laboratories. It is the only center in Turkey to include the Advanced Endoscopic/Robotic Surgery Training Center. At CASE, over 200,000 training sessions have been completed, with more than 40,000 foreign physicians trained. Its advanced software integrates data from 80 cameras, simulators, and medical devices, enabling precise performance tracking for every participant.With unmatched medical simulation training modalities and technological infrastructure, CASE stands at the forefront of healthcare education globally. It provides students and professionals with immersive, high-fidelity learning experiences that maximize technical, teamwork, and communication skills.
A City University
A city-centered university that makes a difference through its diverse social facilities and opportunities for personal growth.
Close Cooperation With Acıbadem Healthcare Group
Maintaining a strong and strategic partnership with Acıbadem Healthcare Group, enabling students unique access to world-class clinical environments and professional opportunities.
To explore the Acıbadem Healthcare Group ecosystem in detail:
https://www.acibadem.com.tr/en
https://acibademinternational.com
https://www.acibademhealthpoint.com
International Recognition
Acıbadem University attains significant international recognition through the accreditation of its academic programs by globally respected quality assurance bodies, confirming their consistency with high-level global academic norms.
Contact Us Anytime via Our WhatsApp Help Desk
You can leave us a message 24/7 through our WhatsApp Help Desk communication line. Our team will get back to you as soon as possible and assist you.
USEFUL INFORMATION
Required Documents For Online Application
Passport or National ID copy
One Biometric Photo
High School Diploma (if available)
High School Transcripts (includes all years and grades)
Exam results (such as SAT - if available)
English language proficiency exam (if available)
Turkish language proficiency exam for Turkish programs.
Letter of Intent
Reference letter (for Medicine program two reference letters from Math,  Biology or Chemistry teachers, for others one reference letter from related subject teacher)
Scholarship
Acıbadem University (ACU) offers scholarships to International Students who apply to associate degree and undergraduate programs. ACU Scholarship Committee will award scholarships based on all academic documents, international exam scores, recommendations and extra-curricular documents that demonstrate outstanding performance; therefore, there is no specific test score or average that automatically award a scholarship. Scholarships cover only the tuition fee. Additionally, a success scholarship will be awarded at the end of the first year (excluding the English Prep School), depending on GPA.
Dormitory
Kerem Aydınlar Student Dormitories provide comfort and safety to students as if they  were in their homes. Student Dormitories  are within walking distance to the campus  and designed to meet all the needs of  students for accommodation.

The Conference Center has state of the art infrastructure and powerful technical equipment as well as two simultaneous translation cabins for international organizations.

The multi-purpose, 750-seat Conference Center, with an indoor area of 1.700 square meters, features a 102-square meter stage, sound and acoustics systems and it hosts many academic and social functions and events.
The Conference Center has state of the art infrastructure and powerful technical equipment as well as two simultaneous translation cabins for international organizations.
The center also features three backstage rooms, a 500 square meter foyer and three separate salons capable of seating 30 people each. The salons are connected to the Conference Center and can be used as three separate rooms hosting 30 people each, or the separating partitions can be removed resulting in one salon seating 90 people.
The Conference Center hosts university events and can also be used for other events outside the university.

The Healthcare Center provides outpatient services and refers patients to the Acıbadem Healthcare Group for advanced examinations and treatments where necessary.
The center is open during the week between business hours.
Psychological Counseling
Students are also provided with Psychological support when necessary. The Psychology consultant visits the campus on certain days of the week. This means it is necessary to make an appointment prior to being seen.
Student Relatives Identification System
The Student Relatives Identification System enables Acıbadem University students and their close relatives to benefit from discounted services offered by the hospitals and outpatient centers of Acıbadem Healthcare Group. Students are required to fill in a form located on BADEMNET to identify themselves and their relatives in order to be able to benefit from this service. Once identified, students and their relatives are able to benefit from the same discount rate which is applicable to the personnel of Acıbadem Healthcare Group. The discount rate is subject to change depending on the type of service required.
Sağlık Merkezi
Öğrenci Yakınlarını Tanımlama
Psikolojik Danışmanlık Birimi
Sağlık Merkezimiz; hekim ve hemşirenin bulunduğu, ayakta sağlık hizmeti veren, gerekli durumlarda acil müdahale yapan; ileri tetkik ve tedaviler için 2.basamak sağlık kuruluşlarına yönlendiren birimdir. Merkez hafta içi her gün mesai saatleri içinde (8.30-17.30) hizmet vermektedir.
Öğrencilerimize hastalık için istirahat raporu verme ve sağlık kuruluşlarından staj öncesi istenen ”işe giriş muayenesi” yapma yetkisi de bulunmaktadır.
Öğrenci Yakınlarını Tanımlama Sistemi ile Acıbadem Üniversitesi öğrencileri ve yakınları Acıbadem Sağlık Grubu’nda yer alan hastaneler ve tıp merkezlerinden indirimli olarak hizmet alma hakkına sahiptir. Haktan yararlanabilmek için öğrencilerin, BADEMNET’te yer alan formu doldurarak kendilerini ve yakınlarını sisteme tanımlamaları gerekir. Sisteme tanımlama sonrası öğrenci ve yakınları Acıbadem Sağlık Grubu personeline uygulanan indirim oranında hizmetten faydalanır. Hizmetin türüne göre indirim oranları değişmektedir.
Psikolojik danışmanlık birimi; Acıbadem Üniversitesi öğrencilerinin ve personelinin bireysel ve sosyal gelişimlerine destek olan, psikolojik sorunlara yönelik koruyucu, önleyici ve gerektiğinde müdahaleye yönelik hizmet sunmayı hedefleyen bir birimdir.
Psikolojik Danışmanlık Biriminin Hedefleri
Psikolojik danışmanlık biriminden hizmet alan kişileri danışmanlık süreciyle ilgili bilgilendirmek
Bireyin kendini tanımasını, yetenek, ilgi ve becerilerini keşfetmesini sağlamak
Bireye şikayetleri ve yaşamıyla ilgili iç görü kazandırmak
Bireyin deneyimlerini, duygularını tanımlamak ve yeniden anlamlandırmak
Psikiyatrik yardıma ihtiyaç duyulduğu takdirde kişilerin tanı, takip ve tedavilerinin sağlanabilmesi için ilgili hekime yönlendirmek genel tedavi planının hedefleri olarak düşünülmektedir.
Psikolojik Danışmanlık Sürecinin Genel İlkeleri
Bireysel görüşme için başvurular e-posta yoluyla alınmaktadır.
Seanslar haftada 1 gün ve 45 dakika olacak şekilde planlanmaktadır.
Randevusuna gelemeyecek danışanlar, bu durumu en az 1 gün önceden e-posta atarak bildirmelidir.
Randevusuna üst üste iki kez haber vermeden gelmeyen danışanın, psikolojik danışmanlık ya da psikoterapi sürecini sonlandırmak istediği varsayılarak süreç bitirilir. Tekrar bireysel görüşme randevusu almak için yeniden başvuru yapar ve bekleme listesine alınır.
Danışanlardan kaynaklanan görüşmeye geç kalma durumlarında, gecikme süresi ilk 20 dakikayı aşmıyorsa bireysel görüşme geriye kalan süre kadar devam eder. Gecikme süresi ilk 20 dakikayı aştığı takdirde, bireysel görüşme otomatik olarak iptal edilir. Uzmandan kaynaklanan gecikmeler uygun şekilde telafi edilir.
Ön görüşme ya da bireysel görüşme randevuları dolu olduğu takdirde, danışanlar bekleme listesine alınır. Acil durumlarda, danışanın bunu özel olarak bildirmesi koşuluyla bekleme listesine yönlendirme dışında yeni bir düzenleme yapılabilir. Acil bildirisinin uygunsuz yapıldığı durumlarda, danışanın başvurusu normal koşullardaki gibi bekleme listesine yönlendirilir.
Gizlilik
Yapılan tüm görüşmeler gizli tutulmaktadır. Kişisel bilgiler kişinin onayı alınmadan hiçbir kişi, birim ya da kurumla paylaşılamaz. Ancak, kişinin kendisine ya da bir başkasına zarar verme düşüncesi veya planı varsa gerekli kişilerle temasa geçilmektedir. Bu koşullar altında dahi, başka birisi aranmadan önce görüşülen kişiden onay almaya çalışılmaktadır.
Randevu
Randevu için
semra.erol@acibadem.edu.tr
adresine e-posta gönderebilirsiniz. Başvurunuzu takiben randevu düzenlenmektedir. Yoğunluk olduğu takdirde bekleme listesine alınarak en kısa sürede dönüş sağlanmaktadır.
E-posta:
semra.erol@acibadem.edu.tr
Dahili:
4269

Shuttle Hours
Shuttle Services run between the University and Kozyatağı Metro Station.
Shuttle Services operate on weekdays between 07:40 – 18:00 hours, free of charge.
By Metro;
Take the Kadıköy-Kartal metro line on the Asian side of Istanbul. Get off at Kozyatağı Station. Exit the station via the Hal exit and walk down Kayışdağı Street to Acıbadem University. On weekdays during the education period the university’s shuttle operates between the Hal exit of Kozyatağı station and campus.
By Bus;
The 19K, 19Y, 19V, 19S, 19T, 14A from Kadıköy pier, and the 11T and 320A from Üsküdar stop at the “Acıbadem University” bus stop providing easy access to the University. Please check up to date information regarding bus timetables on
http://www.iett.gov.tr
.
By Car;
Driving in Maltepe-Kadıköy direction on the D100 (E5) highway, take the Hal-Ataşehir exit. Follow the Hal road and turn right on to Kayışdağı Street. The university is located 2 kilometers ahead the street.
Driving in Kadıköy – Maltepe direction on the D100 (E5) highway, take the Ümraniye-Ataşehir-Hal exit. Pass the Göztepe junction in 700 meters then turn right on to the Hal-Ataşehir road. Turn left at the traffic lights on to the Hal road. After 400 meters, turn right towards Kayışdağı Street. Acıbadem University is located 2 kilometers ahead the street.

Poster and Presentation Guidelines

Dean - Prof. Dr. Nadi Bakırcı
We began education at Acıbadem University Faculty of Medicine in 2009 and graduated our first students in 2015. Since then, we have been graduating approximately 80 students every year. Although we are a young faculty, we are pleased to see that our nearly one thousand graduates are working successfully as physicians and scientists in a wide variety of fields across the country and around the world.
We aim to educate young people from Turkey and abroad who choose us to study medicine as universal physicians who are socially and globally responsible; capable of advocating for health; committed to scientific knowledge and able to use it for the benefit of society; curious, research-oriented, and motivated for lifelong learning; able to use technology appropriately; humane physicians who prioritize the needs of their patients and society; strong communicators; and individuals who have internalized ethical values and human rights.
In line with these goals, we focus on society’s priority health problems and needs and strive to develop our social accountability in all dimensions. In this context, the societal impact created by our graduates and academic activities is very important to us, and strengthening this impact is a fundamental priority of our medical faculty.
Our education program has completed accreditation processes as a result of external evaluations and has received internationally recognized TEPDAD accreditation. In addition, we have earned the right to use the Turkish Qualifications Framework (TQF) logo on graduation certificates, indicating that the program meets the standards related to program competencies. To ensure the sustainability of this quality, we continuously evaluate and improve our program.
Following the first three years in which basic and clinical sciences are integrated, our program consists of three phases: two years of clinical clerkships and one year of internship. Within the program, we have created a corridor called the Clinical and Professional Skills Program (CMPS), which includes research, the social aspects of medicine, communication and basic clinical practices, as well as medical ethics and professionalism skills. In addition, our students have the opportunity to take a wide variety of elective courses and projects (EMED) in social and technical fields of medicine in which they are interested and can further develop themselves. Through elective fields and social responsibility activities implemented with program updates, we aim to strengthen social responsibility and societal impact, which are among the strategic priorities of our faculty.
During clinical clerkships, students encounter patients directly in the hospital environment and develop their clinical knowledge and skills. At the end of the clerkships, informed assessment approaches ensure that students are well prepared for the internship period.
During the internship year, students participate in medical practice under the supervision of clinical educators in hospitals and primary care settings, gaining the opportunity to apply in an integrated manner the knowledge and skills they have acquired up to that point.
Throughout their education, students participate in programs at the Clinical Simulation and Education Center (CASE), where they develop their clinical practice skills.
The university’s rich research infrastructure and opportunities to work with highly qualified scientists enable students to advance in the field of science. Each year, numerous studies produced by our students are published in prestigious journals. Our newly established MD-PhD Program offers an important opportunity for students who are curious about science and wish to pursue a research-oriented career.
Acıbadem University Faculty of Medicine continues its existence as an institution that invests in science; encourages students to conduct research and produce knowledge; ensures students’ active participation in program renewal, development, and decision-making processes; values community-based education alongside clinical clerkships; and aims to train universal physicians ready to advance in all fields of medicine both domestically and internationally.
Wherever our graduates may be, and whichever field they choose within the broad spectrum of medical practice, we expect them to possess the shared fundamental knowledge, skills, and attitudes of good medical practice and good scientific inquiry—that is, to be both a good physician and a good scientist.

Dean
Prof. Nadi Bakırcı
Dean
Prof. Dr. Nadi Bakırcı graduated from Istanbul University Istanbul Faculty of Medicine in 1989. He received his PhD in Public Health from Ege University, completing his doctoral studies at the Manchester North West Lung Research Centre and Lancashire cotton mills. Between 1998 and 2008, he conducted academic activities in public health, epidemiology, and occupational health at Marmara University School of Medicine, where he was a faculty member.
He has been a faculty member at Acıbadem University School of Medicine since its inception in 2009, focusing on medical education and educational administration. He has played an active role as coordinator and vice dean responsible for medical education in the planning and management of the medical education program. He has served as the Dean of the Faculty of Medicine since 2021.
Vice Deans
Prof. Özden Hatırnaz Ng
Vice Deans
Prof. Dr. Özden Hatırnaz Ng graduated from the Department of Biology, Faculty of Science at Istanbul University in 2002. She completed her MSc (2002–2005) and PhD (2005–2011) in the Genetics Program at the Institute of Health Sciences, Istanbul University. During her doctoral studies, she conducted research at the Department of Immunology at Erasmus Medical Center (EMC), the Netherlands, and at the Department of Molecular Stem Cell Biology at Leiden University Medical Center (LUMC). She also worked as a visiting researcher at the Department of Pharmacogenetics at St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital in the United States and at the Department of Human Genetics at Heidelberg University in Germany.
Between 2005 and 2018, she served as a research assistant at the Department of Genetics at the Aziz Sancar Institute of Experimental Medicine, Istanbul University. Her main research interests include childhood cancers, genetic predisposition to cancer, rare and undiagnosed diseases, and advanced therapeutic approaches. In 2018, she received the title of Associate Professor in Medical Genetics and was appointed to the Department of Medical Biology at Acıbadem University School of Medicine in the same year. She was promoted to Professor in 2023 and has been serving as the Vice Dean responsible for Research and Academic Affairs since March 2024.
Prof. Serdar Beken
Vice Deans
Dr. Serdar Beken graduated from Hacettepe University School of Medicine in 2002. He completed his residency training in Pediatrics at Hacettepe University School of Medicine in 2008 and subsequently completed his Neonatology fellowship training at Gazi University School of Medicine in 2011. Following the completion of his neonatology fellowship, he received advanced clinical training at Hospital Universitario La Paz, Madrid, Spain, in the fields of neonatal hemodynamics and functional imaging. Between 2012 and 2015, he worked as a neonatologist at Dr. Sami Ulus Maternity and Children’s Training and Research Hospital.
Since 2015, Dr. Serdar Beken has been serving as a faculty member in the Department of Pediatrics at Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University School of Medicine. Since 2024, he has also been serving as the Vice Dean responsible for Medical Education at the same institution. In 2025, he completed his Master’s degree in Medical Education at Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University.

VISION, MISSION AND VALUES
Our Vision
To become one of the best medical schools in Turkey and among the leading medical schools in the world through strong, pioneering, and innovative practices in education, research, and service; and to fulfill our social and societal responsibilities at the highest level.
Our Mission
To provide pioneering and innovative medical education at international standards, ensuring continuous accreditation;
To train honest physicians and scientists who are equipped with the knowledge and skills to provide the best healthcare services, who have love for humanity, adhere to professional ethical values, possess scientific curiosity and analytical thinking, are sensitive to society and the environment, refrain from discrimination, have adopted lifelong learning habits, and advocate for health;
To create a pioneering, innovative, and entrepreneurial research environment that is preferred by scientists at both national and international levels;
To contribute to public health and science through the scientific knowledge, products, and methods developed;
To provide up-to-date, evidence-based, patient-centered healthcare services using the most appropriate technologies and in accordance with ethical standards;
To conduct studies and expand collaborations that address the health needs of the community with awareness of social and societal responsibilities.
Our Core Values
Scientific freedom                                 Freedom of thought and expression
Fairness                                                 Commitment to ethical values
Commitment to scientific knowledge    Respect for diversity
Innovation                                              Merit-based approach
Participation                                          Social reliability – accountability
Transparency                                        Sustainability

Strategic Plan
Strategic Plan of Acıbadem University Faculty of Medicine (2022–2026) was reviewed and approved at the Faculty Board meeting held on 28 April 2022 and subsequently updated at the Faculty Board meeting dated 12 December 2024.
Structured under the headings of education, research, community service, social responsibilities, and collaborations and stakeholder relations, the Strategic Plan aims to increase and ensure the sustainability of practices recognized as exemplary in accreditation processes, to educate competent physicians in line with national and international standards, to strengthen a student-centered education approach, and to expand the clinical training network.
In the field of research, the plan seeks to support students’ active participation in research projects, to train physicians with strong scientific production capacity through the MD-PhD program, to encourage interdisciplinary innovative research, and to become an internationally recognized research center.
Within the scope of community service, it is envisaged to strengthen educational activities through social responsibility projects, to implement projects addressing the priority needs of society, and to expand initiatives that enhance public trust. In terms of social responsibilities, the plan aims to support the professional development of academic and administrative staff, to conduct development-oriented evaluations through transparent and fair performance criteria, and to carry out planned development initiatives addressing staffing needs. Under collaborations and stakeholder relations, it aims to increase the participation of students and academics in international exchange programs, expand existing partnerships with national and international education and research institutions, and develop new collaborations.
Faculty of Medicine Strategic Plan 2022-2026
Faculty of Medicine Strategic Plan 2018-2021

Strategic Goals and Priorities
Graduate Competencies
Program Components
Structure of Educational Program
Forms
The strategic plan of the School of Medicine aims to enhance sustainable quality in medical education and to deliver a medical education program aligned with societal needs. Within this framework, maintaining the accreditation of undergraduate medical education, strengthening the competency-based structure of the curriculum, and expanding student-centered learning approaches are among the primary objectives.
Improving the reliability and validity of assessment and evaluation processes, enhancing clinical learning environments, and ensuring sustainable quality in postgraduate medical education are also key priorities. In addition, the Faculty aims to strengthen the community-oriented and community-based characteristics of the educational program, encourage students’ active participation in social responsibility projects, and continuously improve educational outcomes by monitoring the societal impact of its graduates. Through these efforts, the goal is to establish a robust, trustworthy, and sustainable model of medical education with strong academic and societal value.
