pages.description: Acıbadem University Graduate School of Social Sciences was founded in 2014, to conduct academic and professional level graduate programs in the fields of human sciences and social sciences. The Graduate School of Social Sciences is open to applications from candidates who are graduates of social and health sciences disciplines, who want to specialize and improve their professional knowledge, skills, experience and equipment. The institute offers Master's and PhD programs with and without thesis, in the branches of humanities and social sciences.
pages.text:
Home
Graduate School Of Social Sciences
Home
Graduate School Of Social Sciences
About
University Introduction Booklet
Virtual Tour
Acıbadem University Graduate School of Social Sciences was founded in 2014, to conduct academic and professional level graduate programs in the fields of human sciences and social sciences. The Graduate School of Social Sciences is open to applications from candidates who are graduates of social and health sciences disciplines, who want to specialize and improve their professional knowledge, skills, experience and equipment. The institute offers Master's and PhD programs with and without thesis, in the branches of humanities and social sciences. In the light of evidence-based modern scientific method, theoretical and practical scientific researches are carried out.
Prof. Murat KURT
Head
Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University, Graduate School of Social Sciences
Mission:
The mission of the Graduate School of Social Sciences at Acıbadem University is to train experts and practitioners who possess scientific and ethical understanding, are inquisitive, critical thinkers, capable of self-reflection, highly aware, sensitive to social issues, respectful of cultural, social, and individual differences, and able to produce original works and projects.
Vision:
With well-equipped and competent faculty members, adopting an active, innovative, creative, and student-centered approach, the vision is to educate researchers and experts who have received internationally recognized education, gained competence in their field, can respond to societal needs, conduct work and publish at both national and international levels, and contribute to the development of social sciences.
The core principles and values of the Graduate School of Social Sciences at Acıbadem University include:
Respect for human autonomy and the individual
Respect for privacy and confidentiality
To be beneficial without causing harm
Responsibility, honesty
Equality, justice
Respect for differences and free of any form of discrimination
Sensitivity to contemporary issues
Strict adherence to research and publication ethics
Freedom of thought and research, critical perspective
Participation in education and management
Openness to innovation, continuous learning, and development
Competence, proficiency, ability to work in a multidisciplinary manner
Student-centered approach
Academy-community collaboration
Serving to broaden education and teaching
Adhering to international scientific competence standards
Sosyal Bilimler Enstitüsü 2022-2026 Stratejik Planı
Ethical Principles of Professional and Research Ethics of the Graduate School of Social Sciences:
Honesty
Respect
Accountability
Reliability
Responsibility
Solidarity
Source:
The European
Code of Conduct
for Research Integrity Revised Edition 2023
Sor
Cevaplayalım

Lecturer Dr. Emrah Akkurt
Director
Dear ACUPEP Students,
Welcome to Acıbadem University Preparatory English Program (ACUPEP).
Our mission in ACUPEP is to equip you with primarily linguistic and academic skills in English so that you can pursue your English-medium faculty courses with ease as well as communicate effectively. On top of that, we envision a successful ACUPEP graduate as an individual capable of using English listening, speaking, reading and writing language skills efficiently, thinking critically and creatively, who is a self-regulated learner with a passion for life-long learning, holding high values for academic integrity and fairness, personal and universal ethics, and respect for differences. To this end, ACUPEP courses have been designed to assist you in excelling in English language skills as well as 21st century communication and basic academic skills so that you can make a difference as Acıbadem University graduates nationwide and internationally. As you all have different academic backgrounds, study habits and English language skills, you will each go through a unique, challenging yet rewarding journey here, employing differentiated learning strategies. All the program lecturers are well equipped to assist you during your ACUPEP studies and are ready to provide you with the guidance and support both in and outside the classroom.
We will be more than happy to assist and guide you in exploring language and study skills and reflecting on your performance throughout your journey with us. We, as ACUPEP lecturers, wish you a very successful academic year and kindly request you to be fully committed to your courses here to ensure you will be competent users of English when you are eligible to start your freshman studies.
Emrah Akkurt
Director, Preparatory English Program
Preparatory English Program is a minimum half, maximum 2-academic-year compulsory program for Faculty of Arts and Sciences, departments of Molecular Biology and Genetics, Psychology, Faculty of Engineering, departments of Computer Science Engineering, Medical Engineering, Faculty of Health Sciences, departments of Nursing, Dietetics and Nutrition, Faculty of Medicine, and Faculty of Pharmacy students since their medium of instruction is English.
The program is designed to enable our students to use English language skills effectively and express themselves in all academic and social contexts. To realize this goal, Listening, Reading, Speaking, Use of English, and Writing and courses are supported by Prep Academic Skills course to make sure the students can transfer the knowledge to real life practices and familiarize themselves with the required academic skills both in their academic and professional lives.

Academic English Program
As English is today's “lingua franca” of international communication in all fields; it is an essential prerequisite for students. The Undergraduate English Program aims at developing and ensuring a high quality and sustainability of English education.
The English courses offered by the Program are an integral part of the education offered at Acıbadem MAA University. We provide a learning environment for the English Medium Instruction (EMI) students to accomplish the high level of language proficiency necessary to continue their studies in their Faculties and Schools and develop their potential as critical, analytical, and autonomous learners. For departments where instruction is in Turkish, we make a huge difference by providing students with a considerable amount of input by which we contribute to the maintenance and improvement of English within the university and the community at large.
Instructors in this Program work cooperatively with the departments to design meaningful courses which meet the needs of the students. The program is challenging and we have high expectations from our students and from our instructors. The courses are offered through an interactive and engaging learning environment and this is supplemented with current technologies, interdisciplinary research projects and authentic, up-to-date materials to enrich the learning experience of our students. We believe this will in turn make our graduates strong candidates for future employment who can also effectively contribute to achieve Turkey’s future vision.
Assist. Prof. Nafiye Çiğdem AKTEKİN
Director, AEP

Acıbadem University is keen on educating outstanding and competent healthcare professionals and experts in supporting roles. The institution is based on Acıbadem culture’s 30 years practice and knowhow on healthcare services.
Acıbadem Health Group provides healthcare services in 22 hospitals and 18 medical centers at 5 countries. This legacy assigns the mission to serve the global community. Acıbadem University is pleased to welcome international students and researchers from all over the world at different levels of education.
International students are admitted to the university on undergraduate and graduate levels, as well as transfer students. Acıbadem University also offers postgraduate clinical programs for health industry professionals. Requirements and conditions for each is announced on respective pages. pages.title: Forensic Sciences and Criminology Club | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: Acıbadem University Forensic Medicine and Criminology Club was established to bring together students interested in forensic medicine and criminology and to organize activities in this field. Interviews on criminology, forensic medicine training seminars and studies on violence and types of violence are carried out within the club. The club also supports students who want to carry out scientific research activities in the field of forensic medicine. The club carries out its activities under the guidance of advisor academicians and in cooperation with stakeholder associations.

pages.title: AFAD Club | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: The AFAD Club carries out activities to raise awareness about disasters, organize training sessions on search and rescue and first aid, and prepare society for emergencies. It forms teams and conducts drills to ensure quick and effective response during natural disasters such as earthquakes, floods, and fires. Additionally, the club conducts awareness seminars and social responsibility projects to educate the public about the precautions to take before, during, and after a disaster.

pages.title: European Medical Students Association (EMSA) | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: Acıbadem University EMSA is the university branch of EMSA, the largest medical student union representing medical students in the European geography. In addition to increasing the quality of medical education with its projects, making students stronger in medical science is among its primary goals.
pages.text:
Home
Home
European Medical Students Association (EMSA)
Life at ACU
University Introduction Booklet
Virtual Tour
Acıbadem University EMSA is the university branch of EMSA, the largest medical student union representing medical students in the European geography. In addition to increasing the quality of medical education with its projects, making students stronger in medical science is among its primary goals. The club is a medical student community that focuses on medical ethics and raises the awareness of the society on social, political and cultural issues, as well as facilitates student exchanges, free flow of information and sharing of experiences, increasing European integration and doing all these by working with official institutions in Europe. EMSA's mission is; to create a bond between all medical students in Europe in order to carry the highest standards of medical education in Europe and to help create better quality health opportunities in Europe, to benefit medical students and the society by carrying out trainings, activities and projects related to health issues in the entire European geography, to facilitate intercultural solidarity by organizing cultural and social activities, to become professional in the field of medicine by working with other medical student societies and authorities in Europe.
Sor
Cevaplayalım

pages.title: Nutrition and Dietetics Club | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: Acıbadem University Nutrition and Dietetics Club was established in 2016. The main goal of our club is to raise awareness about nutrition in all segments of the society, especially our university, and to represent our university, which is thematic in the field of health, in the best way. The main purpose of our club is to help students evaluate their time outside of class more efficiently and pleasantly with the activities it will organize on the basis of nutrition. In line with these aims, studies are carried out to increase the awareness of nutrition in the society.

Home
Nutrition and Dietetics Club
Life at ACU
University Introduction Booklet
Virtual Tour
Acıbadem University Nutrition and Dietetics Club was established in 2016. The main goal of our club is to raise awareness about nutrition in all segments of the society, especially our university, and to represent our university, which is thematic in the field of health, in the best way. The main purpose of our club is to help students evaluate their time outside of class more efficiently and pleasantly with the activities it will organize on the basis of nutrition. In line with these aims, studies are carried out to increase the awareness of nutrition in the society. We organize events, conferences and seminars on nutrition on important days and weeks. In addition to these, we organize educational workshops such as movie screenings about healthy living, games, trips to increase physical activity, activities and cooking techniques.

pages.title: IT Club | Acıbadem Üniversitesi
pages.description: Established on June 30, 2022, the Acıbadem University Informatics Club is a student community that brings together students interested in technology and encourages knowledge sharing in areas such as software development, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and game design. The club offers its members the opportunity to put theoretical knowledge into practice through training sessions, workshops, and project-based events aligned with industry dynamics.
pages.text:
Home
Home
IT Club
Life at ACU
University Introduction Booklet
Virtual Tour
Established on June 30, 2022, the Acıbadem University Informatics Club is a student community that brings together students interested in technology and encourages knowledge sharing in areas such as software development, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and game design. The club offers its members the opportunity to put theoretical knowledge into practice through training sessions, workshops, and project-based events aligned with industry dynamics. By fostering an environment that supports innovative thinking, it enables students to enhance their technical skills, gain experience in teamwork, and make a strong start to their careers.
Within the club, the Game Development Committee, Artificial Intelligence Committee, and Cybersecurity Committee help students specialize in their areas of interest. The Game Development Committee works with platforms such as Unity and Unreal Engine, while the Artificial Intelligence Committee focuses on machine learning and deep learning. The Cybersecurity Committee organizes training sessions and hands-on activities in network security and ethical hacking. The Acıbadem University Informatics Club invites all students interested in technology to develop themselves in the field of informatics and take part in innovative projects.
Sor
Cevaplayalım
